## Topics

### Living Environments and Noise Management

  - [Andrej migrates to different spots in his building based on fluctuating noise levels throughout the day](https://fathom.video/share/xKEM-xdPDvhHTWwx7PeW6eQzsKTUHcUh?tab=summary&timestamp=27.0)
  - [Jimmy expressed appreciation for quiet living, contrasting with past experiences in a college town](https://fathom.video/share/xKEM-xdPDvhHTWwx7PeW6eQzsKTUHcUh?tab=summary&timestamp=72.0)
  - [Both discussed challenges of living in busy areas (city center for Andrej, college town for Jimmy)](https://fathom.video/share/xKEM-xdPDvhHTWwx7PeW6eQzsKTUHcUh?tab=summary&timestamp=55.0)
  - [Andrej's location: heart of the city, occasional loud individuals rather than constant street noise](https://fathom.video/share/xKEM-xdPDvhHTWwx7PeW6eQzsKTUHcUh?tab=summary&timestamp=55.0)
  - [Jimmy's past experience: 10 years in a college town, issues with rowdy first-year students new to alcohol](https://fathom.video/share/xKEM-xdPDvhHTWwx7PeW6eQzsKTUHcUh?tab=summary&timestamp=79.0)

### Personal Preferences

  - [Andrej noted he was never a "party man" even when younger, preferring peace and quiet at home](https://fathom.video/share/xKEM-xdPDvhHTWwx7PeW6eQzsKTUHcUh?tab=summary&timestamp=95.0)
  - [Jimmy emphasized cherishing quiet youth, implying a similar preference for calmer environments](https://fathom.video/share/xKEM-xdPDvhHTWwx7PeW6eQzsKTUHcUh?tab=summary&timestamp=67.0)
